props.name: heading
props.description: The application name displayed in the header.

props.name: url
props.description: URL for the header link. Clicking the logo/heading navigates to this URL.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls whether the side menu is expanded or collapsed.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: userName
props.description: User's name displayed in the profile section.

props.name: userSecondaryText
props.description: Secondary text displayed below the user's name, such as role or email.

slots.name: primary
slots.description: Primary navigation items displayed at the top of the menu.

slots.name: secondary
slots.description: Secondary navigation items displayed below the primary section.

slots.name: account
slots.description: Account-related items shown in the user profile dropdown.

subComponents.name: WorkSideMenuItem
subComponents.description: A single menu item within the WorkSideMenu. Can render as a link (when url is provided) or as a button with popover content.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon name displayed for the menu item.

props.name: label
props.description: The text label displayed for the menu item.

props.name: url
props.description: The URL the menu item links to. When absent, renders as a button instead of a link.

props.name: badge
props.description: Badge text displayed alongside the menu item (e.g., notification count).

props.name: type
props.description: The visual type of the menu item, affecting badge color.

props.name: current
props.description: Whether the menu item represents the currently active page.

props.name: divider
props.description: Whether to show a divider line below this menu item.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fired when the menu item is clicked.

slots.name: popoverContent
slots.description: Content displayed in a popover panel when the menu item is clicked. On desktop, renders inside a goa-popover. On mobile, renders inside a bottom drawer.

subComponents.name: WorkSideNotificationPanel
subComponents.description: A notification panel with tabbed filtering (Unread, Urgent, All). Typically placed inside a WorkSideMenuItem's popoverContent slot.

props.name: heading
props.description: The heading text displayed at the top of the panel.

props.name: activeTab
props.description: The initially active tab for filtering notifications.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onMarkAllRead
events.description: Fired when the 'Mark all as read' footer button is clicked.

events.name: onViewAll
events.description: Fired when the 'View all' footer button is clicked.

slots.name: default
slots.description: WorkSideNotificationItem components to display in the panel.

subComponents.name: WorkSideNotificationItem
subComponents.description: An individual notification card with title, description, timestamp, type badge, and read/unread status.

props.name: title
props.description: The notification title.

props.name: description
props.description: The notification description text.

props.name: timestamp
props.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Displayed as relative time (e.g., '5 min ago', '2 h ago').

props.name: type
props.description: The notification type, shown as a badge icon.

props.name: readStatus
props.description: The read status. Unread items show a green dot indicator.

props.name: priority
props.description: The priority level. Urgent items have a warning background color.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fired when the notification item is clicked.
